title: Register a new account and reach the dashboard
description: A new user can create an account with email and password, complete verification, and land on the dashboard afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Switch to the sign up form
Fill in the full name field with a valid name
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the authentication form
Enter a valid 6-digit verification code
Submit the verification form
Verify the dashboard is displayed
Verify an empty academic record state is displayed

title: Sign in with email and password and reach the dashboard
description: A returning user can sign in with email and password and see the dashboard afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Switch to the sign in form
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the authentication form
Verify the dashboard is displayed
Verify the CGPA summary is displayed

title: Add a semester with multiple subjects and save the updated CGPA
description: A signed-in user can add semester subjects, save them, and see the CGPA summary update with synced data.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Switch to the sign in form
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the authentication form
Add a semester
Fill in the subject name field with a valid subject name
Fill in the credits field with a valid credit value
Select a valid grade
Add another subject to the semester
Fill in the second subject name field with a valid subject name
Fill in the second credits field with a valid credit value
Select a valid grade for the second subject
Save the academic data
Verify the CGPA summary is updated
Verify the saved academic record is displayed

title: Edit subject details and see the recalculated CGPA
description: A signed-in user can update subject information in an existing semester, save changes, and see the CGPA recalculated.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Switch to the sign in form
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the authentication form
Edit an existing subject name or grade in a semester
Save the academic data
Verify the CGPA summary is updated
Verify the updated subject details are displayed

title: Delete an entire semester and confirm the dashboard updates
description: A signed-in user can delete a semester and see the dashboard reflect the reduced academic record afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Switch to the sign in form
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the authentication form
Delete an existing semester
Save the academic data
Verify the semester is no longer displayed
Verify the CGPA summary is updated

title: View grade distribution after signing in
description: A returning user can sign in and see the grade distribution chart on the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Verify the dashboard is displayed
Verify the grade distribution chart is displayed

title: Remove a subject from a semester and save the change
description: A signed-in user can delete a subject from a semester, save the change, and see the academic record update.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Switch to the sign in form
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the authentication form
Remove a subject from an existing semester
Save the academic data

title: Refresh grade distribution after saving academic changes
description: A signed-in user can add or update semester data and see the grade distribution chart update to reflect the new grade counts.

title: Track target CGPA progress with prediction inputs
description: A signed-in user can enter target tracker inputs and see the prediction message and progress bar update.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Switch to the sign in form
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the authentication form
Enter a target CGPA
Select an expected grade
Enter credits per semester

Submit the sign-in form
Open the transcript export action
Verify a print-ready transcript preview is displayed

Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}

Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Toggle password visibility on
Toggle password visibility off
Submit the authentication form
Verify the dashboard or verification screen is displayed

Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the authentication form

Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the authentication form
